singular.action.canceled: Okay, I won't do anything then.
singular.action.question: ❓ What do you want me to do?
singular.choice.congaPrefixType.title: Title
singular.choice.project.edit.option.title: Title
singular.error.aniListError: Something went wrong with the AniList service. Try again later?
singular.error.badRequest: Bad request. What did you expect me to do with <whatever you did>?
singular.error.generic: An error occured. Next time will surely be different!
singular.error.missingMessagePerms:
I do not have sufficient permissions for {channel_1}!
Please ensure I have `VIEW_CHANNEL`, `SEND MESSAGES`, and `EMBED_LINKS` permissions!
singular.error.missingReleasePerms:
I do not have sufficient permissions for {channel_1}!
Please ensure I have `VIEW_CHANNEL`, `SEND MESSAGES`, `MENTION_EVERYONE`, and `EMBED_LINKS` permissions!
singular.error.notFound: Whatever you were looking for was not found.
singular.error.permissions: You do not have permission to do that.
singular.episode.creation.badRequest: To add multiple episodes, the starting episode must be either a decimal number (ex: 3.5) or use the template syntax $(n), where n is a decimal number (ex: "OVA $(3.5)".
singular.episode.creation.error.notNumber: `first` must be a number when `count` >= 1. Consider using `format` with a value like `OVA $`.
singular.episode.creation.error.tooLong: One or more of the episode numbers is too long! Try using a shorter `format`.
singular.project.conflict: A project with the name `{nickname_1}` already exists!
singular.project.creation.failed.badRequest:
An error occured while creating the project.
Please make sure the AniList ID is correct, or manually specify `{autoFields_1}`
singular.project.creation.firstEpisodeNote:
First episode **{episode_1}** is non-standard and may cause misalignment with AniList.
Consider using `/project edit AniListOffset` to align with AniList.
singular.project.creation.publishPrivateProgressI:
**Note**: By default, progress updates are published for private projects.
This can be configured with `/server display publish-private-progress`.
singular.project.creation.success:
I created project `{nickname_1}` for you. You may want to consider the following:
1. `/task (/template-staff) add` to add positions
2. `/task (/template-staff) edit weight` to re-order positions
3. `/project edit AniList` to set airing date/times, and `/project air-reminder enable` to get airing notifications.
singular.project.creation.title: Project Creation
singular.project.edit.clearable: Note: To clear the MOTD, set the MOTD to `-`.
singular.project.modification.title: Project Modification
singular.project.resolutionFailed: Could not resolve alias `{alias_1}` to a project.
singular.task.conflict: A task with the abbreviation {abbreviation_1} already exists!
singular.task.resolutionFailed: A task with the abbreviation {abbreviation_1} was not found.
singular.templateStaff.resolutionFailed: A template staff with the abbreviation {abbreviation_1} was not found.
